prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock **ARE (30v) 2.7L V6 Biturbo** with a **Garrett GT3076R (0.82 A/R, 60mm compressor, 62mm turbine)** setup, paired with **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 CR)** and **Manley H-beam connecting rods** to handle 1.2 bar boost reliably. Use **Siemens DEKA 60lb/hr injectors** and a **Bosch 044 fuel pump** to support 450whp targets.

Drivetrain: Install a **034 Motorsport Stage 3 clutch kit (6-paddle, 550 ft-lb torque capacity)** with a **South Bend dual-disc setup** for launch control abuse. Swap the stock **01E 6-speed Tiptronic** for a **Getrag 6-speed manual (from B5 S4)** with a **PPG short-throw shifter** and **034 Motorsport differential mount insert** to reduce drivetrain slop.

Suspension/Handling: Fit **KW Variant 3 coilovers (80mm-120mm ride height adjustability)** with **H&R 25mm spacers** to eliminate wheel gap. Replace bushings with **034 Motorsport subframe bushings (80A durometer)** and **Powerflex black series control arm bushings**. Add a **Whiteline 24mm rear sway bar** and **SuperPro adjustable front sway bar end links** for roll stiffness.
estetica: Body: Install a **Rieger Tuning RS6-style widebody kit (carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper)** with **custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap** and **debadged grille**. Add **Vorsteiner V-FF107 19x10.5 ET25 wheels** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 265/35/19 tires** for aggressive stance.

Aero: Fit a **Rocket Bunny V1 rear wing (carbon fiber, 1,200mm width)** with **custom aluminum mounts** to clear the Allroad’s roof rails. Add **APR GT-250 front splitter (carbon fiber, 3-piece)** and **custom side skirts (fiberglass, matched to Rieger kit)** for downforce balance.

Interior: Replace seats with **Recaro Pole Position (cloth, fixed-back)** and add **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**. Install a **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede)** with **NRG quick-release hub** and **AEM X-Series wideband gauge (mounted in A-pillar)**. Swap the stock headunit for an **Alpine ILX-F309 (9-inch touchscreen, Apple CarPlay/Android Auto)** with **Focal Utopia Be tweeters** and **JL Audio 10TW3 subwoofer (custom enclosure in spare tire well)**.
